ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source:
Styling can be done using the Style Settings plugin.
  1. Create selectors down below.
  2. Go to the Style Settings tab and style your links!
ast.target:
可以使用 Style Settings 插件进行样式设置。
  1. 在下面创建选择器。
  2. 前往 Style Settings 选项卡并设置你的链接样式！

ast.name: log
ast.target: 已加载超强链接

ast.name: log
ast.target: 已卸载超强链接

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: What attribute to target? Make sure to first add target attributes to the settings at the top!
ast.target: 要定位哪个属性？请先在顶部设置中添加目标属性！

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How to compare the attribute or path with the given value.
ast.target: 如何将属性或路径与给定值进行比较。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Should the matching of the value be case sensitive?
ast.target: 值的匹配是否区分大小写？

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Frontmatter attributes to target, comma separated
ast.target: 要定位的 Frontmatter 属性，用逗号分隔

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If true, this will also supercharge internal links in the editor view of a note.
ast.target: 如果为 true，这也会增强笔记编辑视图中的内部链接。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If true, this will also supercharge the headers of a tab.
ast.target: 如果为 true，这也会增强标签页的标题。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If true, this will also supercharge the file browser.
ast.target: 如果为 true，这也会增强文件浏览器。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If true, this will also supercharge Obsidian Bases.
ast.target: 如果为真，这也会增强 Obsidian Bases。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If true, this will also supercharge plugins like the backlinks and forward links panels.
ast.target: 如果为真，这也会增强诸如反向链接和前向链接面板等插件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If true, this will also supercharge the quick switcher.
ast.target: 如果为真，这也会增强快速切换器。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If true, this will also supercharge the link autocompleter.
ast.target: 如果为真，这也会增强链接自动补全器。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Sets the `data-link-tags`-attribute to look for tags both in the frontmatter and in the file as #tag-name
ast.target: 设置 `data-link-tags` 属性，以同时在 frontmatter 和文件中以 #tag-name 的形式查找标签

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Sets the `data-link-<field>`-attribute to the value of inline fields
ast.target: 将 `data-link-<field>` 属性设置为内联字段的值

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This feature has been migrated to metadata-menu plugin https://github.com/mdelobelle/metadatamenu
ast.target: 此功能已迁移至 metadata-menu 插件 https://github.com/mdelobelle/metadatamenu
